title: King Textures
description: Changes core Minecraft items into a PvP or royal way.
body:
Changes Minecraft textures but in a vanilla way, making them royal themed or pvp themed.
The current changed textures are listed below.


**TEXTURES**

- Totem of undying
- Golden Apple
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Bottle o' Enchanting
- Every pickaxe, axe, sword, shovel.
- Cobwebs
- Wind charges
- Ender pearls


**UTILS**

- Low fire
- Low shield
- Fullbright
- Better rain and snow
- Some smaller items (more soon)


More coming soon!


DISCLAIMER: Textures break with item stitching fix.
